meta_title: GUTSKI — Ski pullovers for the slopes and the après-ski
meta_desc: GUTSKI makes ski pullovers that stand out on the mountain and survive the après-ski bar. Available online exclusively at skipullies.com — or find a store near you.
hero_sub: GUTSKI makes ski pullovers that stand out on the mountain and survive the après-ski bar. Breathable, warm and fully customisable — for yourself, your crew or your entire club.
story_tag_text: From the hills of Limburg to the Alps — and every après-ski bar in between.
story_p1: GUTSKI was born from a simple frustration: ski wear was either technical and boring, or fun and useless. We wanted both. A pully that’s warm and breathable on the slopes, and still looks good on the terrace at four in the afternoon.
story_p2: Every GUTSKI is made from 92% polyester and 8% spandex with a brushed interior (220–230 gsm) and antibacterial finish — and fully customisable through our 3D configurator.
tagline: “Go hard on the slopes, stay fresh for the bar.”
usp1_s: Locks in body heat and wicks sweat away instantly. Sweat less, ski more.
usp2_s: 4-way stretch and cloud-soft brushed micro-fleece — freedom of movement without chafing.
usp3_s: Antibacterial treatment: no mid-day change needed before après-ski.
shoot_sub: The new collection, shot at altitude. Scroll through the shoot.
coll_sub: Our signature colourways — or use them as a starting point and make it entirely yours. Available online exclusively at skipullies.com.
coll_note: Personalisation with name and number available on every style.
conf_sub: Rotate, colour and personalise your pully in real-time 3D. What you see is what arrives at your door.
step1_s: Every panel individually colourable — collar, body, sleeves.
step2_s: Club logo, company logo or your own artwork, straight onto the 3D model.
step3_s: Name, number or your battle cry — you decide.
loc_sub: Online, GUTSKI is exclusively available at skipullies.com — but you can try, feel and take one home at these stores.
loc_notfound: No location found, try a city or postcode.
loc_note_text: Do you sell sports or winter sports gear and want GUTSKI in your store?
grp_sub: Nothing bonds a group like matching designs. And nothing is easier to find in a packed après-ski bar.
grp1_s: Club colours and logo on every pully. Special club rates for larger orders.
grp2_s: From stag weekends to the annual ski trip — one design, everyone’s own name.
grp3_s: Company day on the slopes or a gift with character — company logo included.
cta_sub: Discover and order the full collection exclusively at skipullies.com. Shipping across Europe.
foot_about: Ski pullovers with character, designed in Limburg. Available online exclusively at skipullies.com.
b2b_intro: Do you sell sports or winter sports gear? Leave your details and we’ll get in touch about GUTSKI in your store.
b2b_message_ph: Tell us a bit about your store…
b2b_success: Thanks! We’ll get in touch as soon as possible.
